x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: FSM SLAs provide urgency signals Now Assist uses for AI-driven work order prioritization and scheduling.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure FSM SLAs for each work order type and customer tier via the SLA configuration. Target: 3+ active SLA definitions. Now Assist FSM uses SLA breach risk for AI dispatch prioritization.
